senses.gloss: verbal noun of اِدَّعَى (iddaʕā) (form VIII); allegation, claim, contention

examples.text: وقال المتحدث باسم الكرملين ديمتري بيسكوف للصحافيين إن "السلطات الاسبانية وحلف شمال الأطلسي والصحف لم تأت بحجة واحدة ذات قيمة لدعم هذه الادعاءات".
examples.english: The speaker in the name of the Kremlin Dmitri Peskov said to the journalists that “the Spanish authorities and the North Atlantic Treaty and the papers have not come out with a single valuable piece of evidence to support these allegations [that the Russian government has interfered in the Catalonia crisis by spreading disinformation].”

senses.gloss: verbal noun of اِدَّعَى (iddaʕā) (form VIII); accusation; prosecution
